ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-06-2021 Continued To Jun-22-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Default Prove-Up Hearing And Enter Judgment Against Defendant Exit Reality Vr, Inc., A California Corporation; Memorandum And Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Alexander V. Hettena In Support Thereof;
Off Calendar May-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Exit Reality VR, Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR #12913. Email: itofft@sftc.org.

Alexander V. Hettena, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Primary Color Systems Corporation.
Richard Rey, Chief Executive Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Hettena and Rey appeared via ZOOM for today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Exit Reality VR, Inc., a California corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint Open Book, Common Counts and Collections was filed on November 18, 2019, and personally served on defendant Exit Reality VR, Inc.'s Authorized Agent of Process on November 26,2019.
Default as to defendant Exit Reality VR, Inc., a California corporation, was entered on January 17, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 24, 2020.

Plaintiff Primary Color Systems Corporation submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Invoices from Primary Color Systems to Exit Reality VR, Inc................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Primary Color Systems Corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Exit Reality VR, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46,917.44.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,188.06.
Costs - $529.00

Total - $55,634.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
